steps.t: Orc camps can be found all along the road that runs through Nanduhirion, north-west of Talan Haldir. Orc waylayers prowl along the road as well, and c…
Maethoron is on Talan Haldir, located near the banks of Nimrodel, south-east of Nanduhirion. You have stolen weapons from the Orc camps of Nanduhirion…
